A better match is THA.BRD.NEG (Negotiation & Conflict Resolution) or THA.BRD.STK (Stakeholder & Relationship Management), but the most appropriate is THA.BRD.NEG because reflecting on bias is essential for effective negotiation and conflict resolution, especially when dealing with diverse perspectives.
